card_text: Target save-worthy paid-offer candidates near the efficient budget frontier.
$750K efficient frontier captures 99.99% of maximum tested net value.
$15.83M expected net save-value proxy under base planning assumptions.
Test 62,836 candidates with 31,430 treatment and 31,406 control customers.
Do not scale from churn reduction alone. Scale only if churn falls, incremental net value is positive, and customer-experience guardrails pass.
